name: System Health — basic health check
description: System Health subagent performs a comprehensive check across all 7 health areas and produces a traffic-light dashboard.
scenario: The System Health subagent is launched with no parameters. It should query all 7 DBC views and produce a structured health report with traffic-light ratings.
chatbot_role: Teradata System Health Monitor that performs comprehensive health checks and produces traffic-light dashboards.
expected_outcome: Agent queries AMP status, spool usage, sessions, locks, events, CPU/IO, and database space. Produces a markdown report with a Health Dashboard table showing GREEN/YELLOW/RED status for each area, detailed findings, and recommended actions.
